title: Claude Code (Fable) V/S Codex (GPT-5.5) : MATHEMATICAL TEST = ONE CLEAR WINNER!
summary: A comparison of AI subscription plans (ChatGPT Plus, ChatGPT Pro, Claude Pro, Claude Max) versus direct API pricing. The analysis argues that subscription plans offer significantly higher value-to-cost ratios for heavy users, with Claude Pro providing around $400 of API-equivalent usage for $20/month and ChatGPT Pro offering up to $14,000 equivalent value at $200/month, though only worthwhile if usage limits are fully utilized.
writeup: The video compares AI subscription plans (ChatGPT Plus, ChatGPT Pro, Claude Pro, Claude Max) against direct API pricing, working through the value-to-cost math for heavy users. It argues subscriptions deliver far higher value-to-cost ratios: Claude Pro provides roughly $400 of API-equivalent usage for $20 per month, and ChatGPT Pro offers up to $14,000 of equivalent value at $200 per month. The central caveat is that these returns hold only when usage limits are fully utilized, so the advantage depends on token demand.
